The '''Lar system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[D'Aelgoth sector/Legends|D'Aelgoth sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mima II]] and the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Lar]].
